UserDirectory.title: User Directory Profile
UserDirectory.description: User profiles and permissions for system-wide access control

uid.description: Unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user

email.description: The user's registered or derived email address

displayName.description: Full name or custom nickname of the user

isAnonymous.description: Whether this is a guest/anonymous session

lastLogin.description: Timestamp of the user's last authentication

lastActivePlatform.description: The medium on which they were last active

phoneNumber.description: The E.164-conforming phone number of the user

Conversation.title: Conversation Session
Conversation.description: A persistent chatbot session containing sequential chat logs

title.description: Automatically generated or custom-renamed title of the session

messages.description: Chronological array of sent and received messages

users_directory/{uid}.description: Global user account tracking and role verification

users/{uid}/conversations/{conversationI.description: Secure, private chat history logs for each user
